name: IDOR — new endpoint mutates any user's profile without ownership check
notes: The diff adds a new POST /profile/:id/avatar route that updates any profile by URL-supplied id without checking `req.user.id === req.params.id`. This is IDOR by omission — the ownership check is missing in the new code, not removed from old code. NEEDS_HUMAN verdict is acceptable because the auth middleware that *might* sit upstream is not visible in the diff.
